name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-36
title: SKILL.md uses jq in B/B mode but jq is not declared as a dependency
description: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md Step 1 (B/B mode) shows: FEATURE=$(jq -r .related_feature "<bug-or-item-dir>/bug.json"). jq is shelled out but never declared as a required tool anywhere in this feature's spec, contract.md reads, or build-contract.json. Environments without jq will fail silently or with an obscure 'command not found'. Either: (a) declare jq as a required external tool in contract.md reads.external, or (b) replace with python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1])).get("related_feature",""))'.
